data.body: settings.test.ts: remove OpenRouter tests, add opencode scanning tests. settings-coverage.test.ts: remove OpenRouter coverage tests. agent-pool.test.ts: replace openrouter-agent test cases with opencode. keychain.test.ts: remove if keychain deleted. Optionally add opencode-adapter.test.ts for dialect/normalizer tests.
data.title: Update tests for OpenCode and remove OpenRouter test references
